project: Artistic Intelligence - Responsiveness, accessibility, responsibility, equity
title: Artistic Intelligence - Responsiveness, accessibility, responsibility, equity

metadata.program: European Cooperation in Science and Technology (COST)

czech_title.label: Czech title
czech_title.text: Vstricne a zodpovedne strojove uceni pro inovace zalozene na umeni

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The project will contribute to the activities of COST Action CA23158 - ARTinRARE - in the areas related to employing responsive and responsible approaches to assessing GenAI models in art-driven innovations, exploring human-machine interfaces and collaborative environments for practice-based research across the arts, and evaluating advanced text-to-video models for movie and game industry.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Smrz Pavel, doc. RNDr., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader
